zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Gray於1416年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾培斯時，她的父親Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray26歲，母親Elizabeth Wemyss22歲。她於1445年之前與Sir Robert Lyle 1st Lord Lyle結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1490年在蘇格蘭培爾圖利巴迪享年74歲。

nameMeanings.name: Gray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: McGreevy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Seamus, Brendan.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Riabhaigh, a patronymic from the personal name Riabhach ‘brindled, grizzled’. Compare Reavey and Creevy 2.

variants.name: Grayer
meanings: English (southern): nickname from Middle English grei ‘gray’ (see Gray ) + her ‘hair’.

variants.name: Grays
meanings: English (Durham): variant of Gray , with post-medieval excrescent -s, or of Grace .

variants.name: Grice
meanings: English (Midlands): from Middle English grice, grise ‘pig’ (Old Norse gríss), probably a nickname or a metonymic occupational name for a swineherd.
English: nickname for a gray-haired man, from Middle English grice, gris ‘gray’ (Old French gris, apparently of ancient Germanic origin, and probably a distant cognate of Gray 1).
Possibly also an Americanized form of German   Greis  .

variants.name: Grey
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Gray was born in 1416, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray, was 26 and her mother, Elizabeth Wemyss, was 22. She married Sir Robert Lyle 1st Lord Lyle before 1445. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1490, in Tullibardine, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 74.

Elle a épousé Sir Robert Lyle 1st Lord Lyle avant 1445. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1490, à Tullibardine, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 74 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Grayが1416年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで生まれた時，父Andrew Gray 1st Lord Grayは26歳，母Elizabeth Wemyssは22歳であった。1445年以前にSir Robert Lyle 1st Lord Lyleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1490年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアトゥリバーディンで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Gray(이)가 1416년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Wemyss(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1445년 이전 Sir Robert Lyle 1st Lord Lyle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1490년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 툴리바딘에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Gray nasceu em 1416, em Perth, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Wemyss, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Lyle 1st Lord Lyle antes 1445. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1490, em Tullibardine, Perthshire, Scotland, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Gray родилась в 1416 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Wemyss, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Lyle 1st Lord Lyle перед 1445 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1490 г. в местности туллибардаин, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Gray nació en 1416, en Perth, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Wemyss, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Lyle 1st Lord Lyle antes de 1445. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1490, en Tullibardine, Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 74 años.
